title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at ICAT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at ICAT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ICAT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ICAT:
ICAT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT!
